song.title: I Am Ready For You
song.presentation: V1 P C V2 P C B C
song.lyrics: [V1] .Capo 3 . G D/F# C D 1) Lord, You take my heart away with Your love . G D/F# C D And I am willing to put on my faith in Your plan [P] Chorus . Em D C Come and take my life. . Em D C D Make my soul refreshed in truth now [C] . G D C I am ready for You. . G D C D Take my heart and make me new now. . G D C I am ready for You . Em D C To come and fill my soul. [V2] 2) Cleanse all of my mind that is not of You. Break me, teaching me how to find rest in Your hands [B] Bridge . Em G Whatever it takes, . C D I'm needing to make Your will be done . Em G And I'm letting go of my control, . C D For I see what You've done in me.
